description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian with a highly distorted and elongated body, as if stretched and twisted in unnatural ways. The head is human-like and emerges from a central knot where the limbs and torso appear to converge, while the arms and legs are extended into long, ribbon-like forms that splay outward. The figure's lower body is flattened and spread, with the feet and hands barely distinguishable at the ends of the stretched appendages. The surface appears to be covered in a smooth, fabric-like material, giving the impression of a person encased or wrapped in a tight, seamless suit. The overall form is surreal and abstract, lacking realistic anatomical proportions but retaining enough human features to be recognizable as an adult. The asset is visually striking and would stand out in any urban environment due to its unusual and exaggerated shape.
description: A surreal, elongated adult figure with a human head and body stretched into ribbon-like forms, wrapped in a smooth, fabric-like material. The limbs and torso are twisted and splayed outward in an abstract, unnatural pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the human head emerging from a central knot, with arms and legs stretched outward and downward, forming a wide, triangular base.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the extreme elongation of the arms and legs, with the head protruding forward and the body appearing almost flat.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the convergence of limbs at the back, with the stretched appendages forming a symmetrical, splayed pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the ribbon-like extension of the limbs and the twisted, abstract form of the body.
